description_long: This bungalow features a single-story layout with a prominent cross-gabled roof covered in dark shingles. The exterior walls are primarily finished in a reddish-brown brick, complemented by lighter trim around the windows and doors. A covered front porch with supporting columns is visible, providing a welcoming entryway. Multiple windows are arranged symmetrically on the front facade, with additional windows on the sides for ample natural light. The structure sits on a rectangular plot of green lawn, with a small driveway or walkway leading to the entrance. The overall design reflects a Craftsman-inspired style with practical, homey details.
description: A single-story brick bungalow with a cross-gabled dark roof, covered front porch, and symmetrical window arrangement, set on a green lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, and symmetrical windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, cross-gabled roof, and side windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back entrance, additional windows, and a small extension.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side elevation, roof structure, and a visible chimney.
